name: Kingfa Sci. & Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingfa Sci. & Tech. Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of plastic products in worldwide. The company offers plastic compounds, special engineering plastics, fine chemical materials, biodegradable plastics, and wood-plastic materials, as well as carbon fibers and composite materials. Its products and materials are used in office supplies, transportation, appliance, information and communication, lighting, and electronic appliances sectors. Kingfa Sci. & Tech. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
